claim: Integration of physics-based simulations, high-throughput degradation tests and Bayesian optimization shows that perovskites centered at Cs_0.17M_A0.03FA_0.8PbI_3 exhibit minimal optical change under increased temperature, moisture and illumination achieves >100 fold stability improvement as compared to MAPbI3 while reducing the discretized sample design space by more than 1000-fold.

Understanding degradation of novel photovoltaics requires complex, time-consuming measurements on multiple samples. However, new machine learning models are able to accelerate degradation characterization and screening by up to 20x, accurately predicting degradation from only the first few hours of degradation.
